notes: Beta build 2026.07.22-385 — 🪤 Set a trailing stop when you buy. The buy ticket now has an optional trailing-stop %: the stop starts that % below your buy and only RISES as the price climbs (never falls), locking in gains while letting a winner run. It sits alongside your 🎯 target and 🛑 stop — leave it blank for none. (Also in this batch: 🎯 scale-out exits on the auto-pilot — bank part at target, let the rest ride.) Practice money only. Feedback via the ✉ link, top-left.
